name: codex-sidekick-plugin
description: Pair Codex desktop with the Codex Sidekick iOS app, including Tailscale setup helpers.

interface.shortDescription: Pair Codex desktop with the native iPhone sidekick app.
interface.longDescription: A companion plugin for preparing local and Tailscale pairing targets for the Codex Sidekick iOS app.
defaultPrompt: Prepare Codex Sidekick pairing over Tailscale.
Start a Codex app-server for my iPhone sidekick.
Show me the current sidekick pairing target.
